title: The Chautauquan, Vol. 05, April 1885
author: Chautauqua Literary and Scientific Circle; Chautauqua Institution; Flood, Theodore L., 1842- [Editor]

quoteFirst: Upon this momentous day, however, the elements were adverse; and at
quoteLast: , by the clock in the blue drawing-room, she was to be found in that spacious, somber, yet magnificent apartment.
title: Araminta
author: Snaith, J. C. (John Collis), 1876-1936
